arts.ttl: Brighton star continues to milk Manchester City win – Had a specific plan to stop Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion defender Jan Paul van Hecke has revealed his plan to keep Erling Haaland quiet as he continues to milk the 2-1 win over Manchester City. Voetbal Nieuws cover comments from the Brighton defender today made to the D’n Hoefcast podcast, in which the subject of Haaland was brought up once again. The post Brighton star continues to milk Manchester City win – Had a specific plan to stop Erling Haaland appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.sum: The Gunners host Ruben Amorim’s United nine points adrift of table-topping Liverpool, but two points clear of Pep Guardiola’s City.

arts.ttl: Here's what Pep Guardiola can learn from Sir Alex Ferguson about how to rescue Man City, writes IAN HERBERT
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: He offered a jocular reply about the local property market before declaring that managing in such a place would be 'not a problem. Not a problem at all.'

arts.ttl: “We will talk” – Pep Guardiola updates press on Man City future ahead of January
arts.sum: Man City and Pep Guardiola are in an unprecedented position as the Premier League champions have lost their last four games in the competition, which has left a lot of questions ahead of the January transfer window.
